sections.paragraph:
Original: חבק

Transliteration: châbaq

Phonetic: khaw-bak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to embrace, clasp
    1. (Qal)
      1. to embrace
      2. to fold one's hands in idleness (figuratively)
    2. (Piel) to embrace

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 597

Part(s) of speech: Verb
